'''Revenant Esports''' present an Invitational tournamen called '''Revenant Invitational Showdowm''' with a total prize pool of ₹7,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

===Format===
* '''Revenant Invitational Showdown''' : ''July 14th-16th
** 18 teams.
** 3 matchdays.
** 15 matches (5 each day).
{{PUBGM 2023 Points System}}
